data.title: RED: Write failing tests for _read_latest_preconditions LWW and concurrency
data.description:
Write failing tests for the _read_latest_preconditions helper in ticket-lib.sh (LWW semantics and concurrency).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: _read_latest_preconditions(ticket_id, gate_name, session_id) returns the most-recently-written event for that composite key
- [ ] Test: when multiple PRECONDITIONS files share the same (gate_name, session_id) composite key, function returns the one with the highest timestamp prefix
- [ ] Test: two concurrent write processes both complete without data corruption or missing files (flock-backed concurrency)
- [ ] File: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-lww.sh (must NOT yet exist; tests must fail RED)
- [ ] .test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh -> tests/scripts/test-preconditions-lww.sh

## Files to Modify
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-lww.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (add mapping)

## Testing Mode
RED — tests must fail before T5 implements the read function
